summary: App includes narrated reading/voice playback; user requests character-specific voices and narration/content adjustments for a Miles-centered story scene.

existing_features.title: Update narration script generation to avoid explicit speaker labels (e.g., avoid phrases like "Miles says:" / "Jefferson says:" / "Miles thinks:") while still narrating dialogue and thoughts in a natural way.

Add a narration “Voice Style” configuration that lets the user choose different text-to-speech voices (and basic voice parameters like rate and pitch if supported) for key speakers (at minimum: Miles, Jefferson, and a default for all other characters), and apply those selections during playback.
Update story panel metadata so Miles is visually described as Black with curly hair in relevant illustration alt text (at least the opening Miles panel).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add voice style options for character-specific narration (e.g., Miles, his dad, other characters)
Adjust narration to avoid explicit speaker labels like 'so-and-so says'
Update story content/scene details: spider is small and camouflaged
Update story content/character description: Miles is Black with curly hair; include line 'why am I stuck to the ceiling'

projectName: Improve story narration: remove speaker labels, add per-character voice settings, and update Miles visual description
